claim_boundary: This record covers only the current skill entrypoint and local SkillGuard contract files. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.

hard_gates.condition: No canonical native route is selected.
Required native evidence is absent or stale.

residual_risk: Native commands and immutable receipts are intentionally outside this static record.
